auth.loginSubtitle: Sign in to manage your matches
auth.registerSubtitle: Create an account to start broadcasting

validation.passwordMin: Password must be at least 6 characters

dashboard.title: My matches
dashboard.cancelConfirmDesc: The match will be marked as cancelled. You can still edit or duplicate it afterwards.

matchForm.teamPickerHint: Auto-fill team, players and venue from your saved teams
matchForm.descriptionAutoHint: Auto-filled when all fields above are complete — you can edit it freely.
matchForm.descriptionTemplate: Live from {venue}: {homeTeam} take on {awayTeam} in the {competition}. Kick-off at {time} on {date}. Follow every moment live!
matchForm.partsHint1: Single period · short format for U8–U10
matchForm.partsHint3: Three thirds · extended or special format
matchForm.partsHint4: Four quarters · cup or tournament format
matchForm.eventConfigDesc: Choose which events you want to track during the broadcast

validation.scheduledAtRequired: Start date and time are required

control.title: Live broadcast
control.confirmFinish: Are you sure you want to finish the match? This cannot be undone.
control.clockRestored: Match clock restored from saved data
control.offlineWarning: No connection — events are saved locally
control.confirmFinishDesc: This will end the match and write the final summary. This cannot be undone.
control.confirmDeleteEventDesc: Remove this event from the match log?

eventDescriptions.goal: A goal has been scored — the ball crossed the goal line. Log the scorer and the assist.
eventDescriptions.own_goal: A player redirects the ball into their own net. Log the player's name.
eventDescriptions.yellow_card: The referee cautions a player with a yellow card. Two yellows result in a red.
eventDescriptions.second_yellow: A second yellow card leads to an automatic red — the player is sent off.
eventDescriptions.red_card: A straight red card dismissal. The player must leave the pitch immediately.
eventDescriptions.substitution: A player swap. Log the player coming on and the one going off.
eventDescriptions.corner: Awarded when the ball goes out over the goal line off a defender.
eventDescriptions.free_kick: A set-piece kick awarded following a foul or infringement.
eventDescriptions.penalty_awarded: The referee points to the spot — a foul inside the box.
eventDescriptions.penalty_scored: The penalty kick finds the net! Log the taker.
eventDescriptions.penalty_missed: The penalty is off target or saved during open play.
eventDescriptions.penalty_kick: A kick in the penalty shootout. Log the taker and the result.
eventDescriptions.offside: An attacker is caught in an offside position when the ball is played.
eventDescriptions.foul: An illegal challenge or infringement. Log the player and team responsible.
eventDescriptions.injury: A player is down and requires medical attention on the pitch.
eventDescriptions.injury_time_announced: The fourth official signals the minimum additional minutes to be played.
eventDescriptions.shot_on_target: A strike that would have gone in without the goalkeeper's intervention.
eventDescriptions.shot_off_target: A shot that misses the target — wide or over the bar.
eventDescriptions.save: The goalkeeper denies a goal. Log the keeper's name.
eventDescriptions.var_review: The Video Assistant Referee is checking an incident. Play may pause briefly.
eventDescriptions.var_goal_disallowed: After VAR review, the goal has been ruled out.
eventDescriptions.var_goal_confirmed: After VAR review, the goal stands and is confirmed.
eventDescriptions.custom_note: A custom broadcaster note — anything worth highlighting for viewers.

broadcast.notifyDenied: Notifications blocked — enable in browser settings

settings.title: Settings
settings.noTeams: No teams yet — add your first team below
settings.deleteTeamConfirm: Deleting this team will also delete all its players, pitches and competitions. This cannot be undone.
settings.noTeamsHint: No teams yet. Go to Settings to add teams.
